description: World's only manufacturer of EUV (Extreme Ultraviolet) lithography systems, essential for advanced chip production below 7nm. Also produces DUV (Deep Ultraviolet) immersion and dry lithography systems.

_externalRelationships.notes: EUV lithography monopoly. ASML systems require Lasertec mask inspection and HOYA mask blanks. 2026 sales outlook: €36.5B.

_metadata.notes: Critical for AI chip manufacturing. Raised 2026 sales outlook. EUV systems cost $150M+ each. Dutch export controls affect China sales.
